sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32576" key="e)/kpatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκπᾰτ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n32576.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπόπατος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope> </bibl> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑσπέλεθος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
